description: Jeff Zerlin, co-founder of Sky Mavis, discusses his journey in crypto gaming, the evolution of Axie Infinity, and the impact of early NFT projects like CryptoKitties. He reflects on the challenges faced by these projects and the lessons learned in the gaming and blockchain space.
topic_summary: In this episode, Jeff Zerlin shares insights on the future of crypto gaming, the development of Axie Infinity, and the significance of community in shaping gaming experiences. He also addresses the limitations of early NFT projects like CryptoKitties and their influence on the industry [t=114:18].
